summary: Comprehensive testing of attendance control system completed successfully. All backend APIs (19/19) and key frontend features working correctly. System processes Excel files, generates statistics, displays charts, and provides PDF export functionality.
passed_tests: Admin login with credentials admin@empresa.com / Admin2024!
Session persistence with remember me checkbox
Excel file upload and processing (.xls format)
Dashboard statistics display (17 employees, 344 absences, 4 delays)
Charts and data visualization (bar chart, pie chart)
Employee alerts generation (10 alerts for high absences)
Excel preview with 4 sheets (Turnos, Estadístico, Asistencia, Excepciones)
Settings configuration (entry time, tolerance, work hours)
Proper error handling and status codes
